bounties.title: Tweet About $Bountywork
bounties.desc: Post a tweet about $Bountywork with the contract address and at least 2 relevant hashtags. Must have a real account with 50+ followers.

bounties.title: Post a TikTok About $Bountywork
bounties.desc: Create and post a TikTok video about $Bountywork. Minimum 15 seconds, must include the CA in the caption.

bounties.title: Create a $Bountywork Meme
bounties.desc: Design a dank, shareable meme featuring $Bountywork. Must be original and reference the bounty hunter theme. Upload to imgur and share link.

bounties.title: Write a Thread on X
bounties.desc: Write an informative thread (minimum 5 tweets) about $Bountywork covering what it is, how to buy, and why it's a gem. Must be public.

bounties.title: Create a Telegram Sticker Pack
bounties.desc: Design a set of at least 5 Telegram stickers featuring the $Bountywork theme. Submit the sticker pack link as proof.

bounties.title: Refer 5 New Buyers
bounties.desc: Get 5 new people to buy $Bountywork. Have them include your wallet address in their claim so we can verify. Screenshots required.

bounties.title: Make a YouTube Short
bounties.desc: Post a YouTube Short (60 seconds or less) about $Bountywork. Must include the CA in the description. Link required as proof.

bounties.title: Build a $Bountywork Price Bot
bounties.desc: Build and deploy a Telegram or Discord bot that shows live $Bountywork price, market cap, and volume. Share bot link + GitHub repo.

bounties.title: Design a $Bountywork Banner
bounties.desc: Create a banner/cover image for the $Bountywork Twitter/X profile and Telegram group. PNG at 1500x500px minimum.

bounties.title: Post on Reddit
bounties.desc: Post about $Bountywork in a relevant subreddit (r/SolanaMemeCoins, r/CryptoMoonShots, etc). Must reach 10 upvotes. Share the link.

bounties.title: Tag 3 Crypto Influencers
bounties.desc: Post a tweet tagging 3 crypto influencers (10K+ followers each) about $Bountywork. Must be engaging, not spammy.

bounties.title: Add $Bountywork to CoinGecko
bounties.desc: Successfully submit and get $Bountywork listed on CoinGecko. Provide confirmation link and submission receipt.

bounties.title: Shave Your Head
bounties.desc: Shave your entire head on video for $Bountywork. Say the coin name at the end and post it publicly on X. No wigs, no tricks.

bounties.title: Dunk Your Head in a Toilet
bounties.desc: Fully dunk your head in a toilet on camera for $Bountywork. One take, no cuts. Post publicly and tag the community.

bounties.title: Eat a Raw Egg
bounties.desc: Crack and eat a full raw egg on camera in one take. No editing. Post the video with $Bountywork in the caption.

bounties.title: Pour Powder on Yourself
bounties.desc: Pour a full bag of powder (flour, protein powder, etc.) over your head on video. Post publicly.

bounties.title: Shave Your Eyebrows
bounties.desc: Shave off both eyebrows fully on camera for $Bountywork. Must be real. Post publicly.

bounties.title: Create a $BOUNTYWORK Auto-Buy Script
bounties.desc: Write a public open-source script that auto-buys $BOUNTYWORK via Solana web3.js. GitHub required.

bounties.title: Cold Shower for 5 Minutes
bounties.desc: Cold water only, 5 straight minutes on camera. Shout '$BOUNTYWORK' at the end.

bounties.title: Hold an Ice Cube for 2 Minutes
bounties.desc: Hold an ice cube in your bare hand for 2 straight minutes on camera. No gloves, no cuts.

bounties.title: Post on 5 Different Platforms in One Day
bounties.desc: Post $BOUNTYWORK content on X, TikTok, Reddit, Instagram, and YouTube in the same day.

bounties.title: Merch Concept Design
bounties.desc: Design a $BOUNTYWORK T-shirt, hoodie, or cap concept with full mockup. Could become real merch!

bounties.title: Get a $BOUNTYWORK Temp Tattoo
bounties.desc: Get a $BOUNTYWORK temporary tattoo and film yourself showing it to a stranger in public.
